title: ILB-Discover eval set v1.0 — natural-language → rule retrieval
description: Each entry is an NL prompt an agent might receive plus the rule(s) it should retrieve. Used to compute Recall@1 and Recall@5. Expand by adding new entries; never edit existing ones (frozen corpus per principle #9).

entries.prompt: user input flows into shell command
literal password or API key embedded in source
raw user input concatenated into a SQL query string
inserting user-controlled HTML into the DOM
JWT verification with no algorithm specified or with algorithm none
MD5 or SHA1 used for password hashing or integrity check
filename joined directly with user input for fs.readFile
use of eval() or new Function() with non-literal arguments
MongoDB find query taking $where with user data

fetching a URL from user input without allowlist (SSRF)

object property access using a user-controlled key
comparing strings using == instead of timingSafeEqual for tokens
deserializing JSON or YAML from untrusted input
logging an Error object with a stack trace to a public response

request to external HTTP endpoint without timeout
regex constructed from user input
